visualizerParams.title: Binary Search Midpoint Bug
visualizerParams.problemDescription: The binary search function is resulting in infinite recursion or missing elements. There's a subtle error in how the search range is updated. Find and fix it.

solution.explanation: When updating the search range, the current `mid` element (which we already know is not the target) must be excluded from the new range. Failing to use `mid - 1` and `mid + 1` can lead to infinite recursion if the target is not in the list or is at an edge.
